Package swingtree.api.laf

package swingtree.api.laf
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    swingtree.api
     
    swingtree.api.model
     
    swingtree.api.mvvm
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    SwingTreeStyledComponentUI<C extends JComponent>
    This interface is intended to be implemented by the various ComponentUI extensions of a custom Look and Feel which desires to fully integrate with the SwingTree style engine.
    For context, it is important to note that SwingTree ships with a rich style rendering engine and three main ways for configuring styles.
    The most prominent once, which are typically used to build an application, are: Global Styling: see StyleSheet, UIFactoryMethods.use(StyleSheet, Supplier), SwingTree.initializeUsing(SwingTreeConfigurator) Direct Styling in the GUI:
    see UIForAnySwing.withStyle(Styler)
    also UIForAnySwing.withTransitionalStyle(Val, LifeTime, AnimatedStyler)
    and UIForAnySwing.withTransitoryStyle(Observable, LifeTime, AnimatedStyler) The third major way of styling is through the ComponentUI of a custom Look and Feel implementing this marker interface SwingTreeStyledComponentUI.
